description: Replace plan-then-execute architecture with a ReAct-style agentic loop using OpenAI tool use

userStories.title: Agent loop core with call_api tool
userStories.description: As the orchestrator, I need a ReAct-style agent loop that gives the LLM a call_api tool and iterates until the LLM says it's done, so the agent can adaptively complete any Tripletex task.
acceptanceCriteria: New src/agent.py with TripletexAgent class
Constructor takes openai_api_key, model, tripletex_client (TripletexClient instance), and optional file_contents (list[dict])
solve(prompt: str) -> None method that runs the agent loop
System prompt includes the Tripletex API knowledge base (from src/knowledge/tripletex_api.py) and instructions to include ALL data from the prompt
LLM has one tool: call_api with parameters method (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), endpoint (string), body (object or null), params (object or null) — defined using OpenAI tools/function calling format
Each iteration: send messages to LLM -> if response has tool_calls, execute via TripletexClient, append tool result to messages -> repeat
Loop ends when LLM responds with a text message (no tool_calls) meaning it considers the task done
Maximum 15 iterations to prevent runaway loops
API errors (4xx/5xx) are caught and returned to the LLM as the tool result so it can adapt
All API calls and LLM responses are logged with logger
Unit tests with mocked OpenAI: test loop completes when LLM returns text, test tool call is executed and result sent back, test max iterations stops the loop
Tests pass

userStories.title: Agent system prompt with knowledge base and tool instructions
userStories.description: As the LLM, I need a system prompt that tells me how to use the Tripletex API, how to interpret task prompts, and when I'm done, so I can complete accounting tasks correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: System prompt is defined as a constant in src/agent.py (or imported from a dedicated module)
Includes the full TRIPLETEX_API_REFERENCE from src/knowledge/tripletex_api.py
Instructs: include ALL data from the task prompt in API payloads, even fields not listed in the reference
Instructs: use call_api tool for every API interaction
Instructs: respond with a text message (no tool call) when the task is complete
Instructs: GET returns {values: [...]}, POST/PUT returns {value: {...}} — use the actual data from responses, do not guess IDs
Includes efficiency guidelines: minimize calls, don't re-fetch what you just created, avoid trial-and-error
Instructs: handle prompts in all 7 languages (nb, nn, en, es, pt, de, fr)
Instructs: preserve Norwegian characters (æ, ø, å) exactly as given
Tests pass

userStories.title: Update orchestrator to use agent loop
userStories.description: As the /solve endpoint, I need the orchestrator to use the new TripletexAgent instead of PlanGenerator/PlanExecutor so that competition tasks use the agentic approach.
acceptanceCriteria: TaskOrchestrator.solve() creates a TripletexAgent with config settings and the TripletexClient from request credentials
File processing still happens before the agent loop — extracted text is passed to agent as file_contents
Agent is called with the full prompt string
Always returns SolveResponse(status='completed') regardless of agent outcome
Error handling: if agent raises any exception, catch it, log it, still return completed
Remove imports of PlanGenerator, PlanExecutor from orchestrator
Update tests/test_orchestrator.py to test the new agent-based flow with mocked OpenAI
Tests pass

userStories.title: Delete old plan-based code
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the old plan-generate-execute code removed so the codebase is clean and there's no confusion about which path is active.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete src/plan_generator.py
Delete src/plan_executor.py
Remove PlanStep, ExecutionPlan, ExecutionResult from src/models.py
Delete tests/test_plan_generator.py
Delete tests/test_plan_executor.py
Update tests/test_integration.py to test the new agent-based flow (mock OpenAI to return tool_calls then a final text response, mock Tripletex API responses, verify correct API calls are made)
Remove any unused imports across all files
All remaining tests pass
Tests pass

userStories.title: Comprehensive logging for the agent loop
userStories.description: As a developer debugging competition submissions, I need detailed logging of every agent loop iteration so I can see exactly what the LLM decided, what API call was made, and what response came back.
acceptanceCriteria: Log each iteration number (e.g., 'Agent iteration 3/15')
Log the LLM tool call details: method, endpoint, body (truncated if >500 chars), params
Log the API response (truncated if >500 chars) or error message
Log when the LLM decides it's done and what its final message says
Log if max iterations reached without LLM finishing
Log total API calls made, errors encountered, and total duration at the end of the loop
Existing orchestrator logging (NEW TASK RECEIVED, full prompt, raw request payload) is preserved
Tests pass
